DriverSources.Name: Autodetect
DriverSources.Description: Automatically detect system model and download appropriate drivers

_comments.TargetDisk: Disk number or 'auto' for automatic selection
_comments.ESDPath: Local path to Windows ESD/WIM file (takes precedence over download)
_comments.ESDDownloadURL: Direct download URL for Windows ESD (if not using local path)
_comments.DriverSources: Array of driver sources to download and inject during deployment
_comments.PostInstallScripts: Array of script paths to execute after Windows installation
_comments.Note: Remove or disable example driver sources before deployment
